violations.text: Observed the chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of two sanitation buckets at (200) parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC instructed staff to change out sanitation buckets. Retested at (50-100 ppm) at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

The door to the outside, located in the lobby by drive tru, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Observed dishwasher located in the ware-washing area was not in good repair. A service has been placed and "do not use signed" placed on equipment. Establishment will use 3-bay sink to wash, rinse, and sanitized. -Observed ice machine door gasket in poor repair. All equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (ice machine) have an accumulation of residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Observed mop not being air dried. PIC relocated mop at time of inspection. After use, mops shall be placed in a position that allows them to be air-dry without soiling wall, equipment, or supplies. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

The floors underneath shelving in the (dry storage) area has an accumulation debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Food contact surface of ice machine was observed with biofilm in direct contact with ice. Employee voluntary disposed of 6 boxes (15lbs) ice and cleaned surface. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

The door to the outside, located in the lobby by drivetru, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

Observed dishwasher located in the warewashing area was not in good repair. A service has been placed and do not use signed placed on equipment. Establishment will use 3-bay sink to wash, rinse, and sanitized. All equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

Ice was observed adulterated due to contamination from frayed gaskets mixing with the food product. PIC voluntarily disposed of ice and had ice machine serviced at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

Raw hamburger patties and liquid eggs were observed held at 51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Inspector determined that the patties were in the unit for less than four hours and were moved to the walk-in cooler. The cold hold time for the liquid eggs could not be determined and so the PIC voluntarily disposed of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024
